mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where Your Every Whim Becomes Reality!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this, folks. I stroll into a fancy restaurant, flash a smile, and casually mention my association with Bank of Entitlement. Next thing you know, they've closed the entire place just for my lunch. Because, of course, I deserve nothing less than the royal treatment.
